description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with test and deploy stages. In the test stage add a pytest job that uses the rootproject/root-ubuntu16 Docker image and runs sudo apt-get update -qy, sudo apt-get install python-pip -yqq, pip install -r requirements_test.txt, export PYTHONPATH=/usr/local/lib/root:$PYTHONPATH:`pwd`, and python -m pytest -v, then stores the htmlcov/ directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that uses the alpine:latest image, depends on the pytest job, moves the htmlcov folder to public, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, running only on the master branch. Also in deploy add a pypi_production job that uses the python image, runs pip install -U setuptools wheel twine, writes a .pypirc file with the PYPI_USER and PYPI_PASSWORD variables, builds the distribution with python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel, uploads it with twine upload dist/*, then removes the .pypirc file, and is triggered only for tags matching a semantic version pattern (e.g., 1.2.3) and excluded from branch pipelines, publishing the package to PyPI. Define secure variables PYPI_USER and PYPI_PASSWORD for the PyPI job.
